finding: CALO Intelligence policy development inherited portfolio minimum-run validation
resolution: Added validate_policy_development() and switched all policy-development ExperimentConfig paths to scientific-only validation.

finding: Other tabs could silently rehydrate/alter CALO Intelligence controls through global config_changed
resolution: Removed automatic cross-tab config rehydration; experiment binding is explicit only.

finding: Policy qualification borrowed mutable global experiment configuration and master seed
resolution: Qualification now uses CALO Intelligence's own scientific template and local seed control.

finding: Aggregate gpu_ready allowed healthy CUDA to hide a missing Intel XPU runtime
resolution: Bootstrap now evaluates/repairs each detected accelerator backend independently.

finding: XPU discovery depended on serialized bootstrap readiness state and could miss an existing repaired sidecar
resolution: Added live-verified interpreter discovery from override, recorded path, and canonical sidecar path; ResourceMonitor can rediscover at runtime.

finding: Intel GPU detection relied primarily on Win32_VideoController and could miss hybrid-graphics hardware
resolution: Added PnP Display-class fallback using stable VEN_8086 hardware identity and merged PnP adapters into topology mapping.

finding: System Readiness silently omitted a physically present Intel GPU when XPU runtime was unavailable
resolution: Added detected-only non-schedulable Intel/XPU readiness row with explicit repair status.
